name: Card
description: A container pattern for grouped content, supporting static (`Card`), selectable (`InteractableCard`), and navigational (`LinkCard`) variants.
import: import { Card, InteractableCard, InteractableCardGroup, LinkCard } from "@salt-ds/core";

accent.description: Accent border position for card variants that support accents.

value.description: Selection value for `InteractableCard` and controlled value for `InteractableCardGroup`.

children.description: Content rendered inside the card variant.

variants.Card: Static container for grouping related content and optional nested actions.
variants.InteractableCard: Selectable or activatable card surface (standalone or grouped).
variants.LinkCard: Card rendered as a link for whole-card navigation.

accessibility.role: Card: none/semantic container; LinkCard: link; InteractableCard: button (standalone) or radio/checkbox (in group)
keyboard: Tab/Shift+Tab â€” move focus to interactive card elements
Enter â€” activates LinkCard and standalone InteractableCard
Space â€” selects/deselects InteractableCard within group
Arrow keys â€” move/select in single-select InteractableCardGroup
aria: Provide an accessible name for interactive cards via visible text or explicit labeling.
Use InteractableCardGroup for grouped selection semantics instead of custom role wiring.
